fixes_applied.summary: Wrap main content in p-3 sm:p-6 max-w-full overflow-x-hidden; tabs use sticky + overflow-x-auto + whitespace-nowrap
Top 3 cards carry data-registry-backed attribute and a visible 'registry-backed' or 'text-only · not a registry system' badge
Queue card bundle_id renders as a string only; never as a graph node. Linked Top 3 system_id badge appears only when a registry-active id matches
Deterministic Explain System State panel surfaces root cause taxonomy and propagation_path on a single line
Diagnostics replay-debug-panel surfaces graph generated_at, priority generated_at, source_path, replay commands, missing artifacts
